title: Gear Aid Replacement Zipper Pulls 5 Pack Universal Easy Grip TPU Zipper Tabs
description:
Replace broken or missing zipper pulls in seconds with Gear Aid Replacement Zipper Pulls. Designed for compatibility with most zipper sliders, these durable pull tabs provide a convenient repair solution for jackets, backpacks, luggage, tents, sleeping bags and other gear.

The soft TPU grip improves handling and makes zippers easier to operate, while the durable cord attachment stands up to repeated use. Their low-profile design blends seamlessly with a variety of outdoor and everyday equipment.

Gear Aid Replacement Zipper Pulls 5 Pack Universal Easy Grip TPU Zipper Tabs
Restore functionality to jackets, backpacks, tents, luggage, and other gear with Gear Aid Replacement Zipper Pulls. This convenient five-pack provides a quick and simple way to replace missing or broken zipper pulls without replacing the entire zipper assembly.

Designed with a soft ergonomic grip and durable cord attachment, these zipper pulls help improve zipper operation on outdoor equipment and everyday items. The lightweight TPU construction offers lasting durability while maintaining a low-profile appearance that blends with a variety of gear styles and colors.

Compatible with most zipper sliders, these replacement pulls are ideal for jackets, hoodies, backpacks, luggage, sleeping bags, tents, gloves, and more. Whether repairing worn gear or upgrading zipper accessibility, Gear Aid Zipper Pulls provide a practical solution for keeping equipment ready for use.
Key Features
  • REPLACE BROKEN ZIPPER PULLS – Quickly replace missing or damaged zipper pulls on jackets, backpacks, luggage, tents, sleeping bags, gloves, and other gear without replacing the entire zipper
  • EASY GRIP DESIGN – Soft thermoplastic pull tabs provide a comfortable grip and make zippers easier to operate, even when wearing gloves or in cold weather
  • UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY – Designed to work with most zipper sliders and zipper sizes, making them a practical repair solution for a wide range of outdoor and everyday gear
  • DURABLE TPU CONSTRUCTION – Made from lightweight thermoplastic polyurethane (TPU) and strong cord material for long-lasting performance and repeated use
  • FIVE PACK VALUE SET – Includes five replacement zipper pulls so you can repair multiple items, keep extras on hand, or upgrade gear with matching pull tabs
Specifications
MPN: GA-58FH-875H
UPC: 021563726732
Count Per Pack: 5
Material: Lightweight TPU
Recommended Uses: Camping, Hiking, Outdoor Gear Repair
